title: Daily Memo: Trade Disruptions, Trump Calls on Allies
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Oil trade. A Pakistani-flagged oil tanker was able to pass through the Strait of Hormuz and is now heading toward Pakistan, Bloomberg reported. Ship-tracking data appears to show that the vessel, controlled by Pakistan National Shipping Corp., safely sailed through the waterway on Sunday, despite Iran’s repeated claims to have shut the strait to traffic. […]

The post Daily Memo: Trade Disruptions, Trump Calls on Allies appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Oil trade. A Pakistani-flagged oil tanker was able to pass through the Strait of Hormuz and is now heading toward Pakistan, Bloomberg reported. Ship-tracking data appears to show that the vessel, controlled by Pakistan National Shipping Corp., safely sailed through the waterway on Sunday, despite Iran’s repeated claims to have shut the strait to traffic. […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
